message:
✨ Unify AI recommendations and mission suggestions as inline chips

- Convert CardRecommendations to same inline chip style as MissionSuggestions
- Both now show as compact chips in a single line with dropdown on click
- Add snoozed missions to sidebar's Snoozed Items section
- Snoozed actions appear alongside snoozed recommendations and swaps

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
